assets.name: lecture_07_figure_02.png
assets.rationale: Candidate 04 is the clearest and most useful frame. The circle sketch with cross-axes is fully visible, the label at upper left is unobstructed, and the two ket-state expressions with the intervening phase factor are more legible than in the earlier frames, where Susskind blocks more of the board.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: this vector is not equal to this vector.
assets.caption_hint: phase-related state vectors and circle sketch

assets.name: lecture_07_figure_03.png
assets.rationale: Candidate 04 gives the most complete and legible board at this moment. The central bra-ket expression and its line below are less occluded than in the earlier frames, and the supporting geometric sketches on both the left and right boards are simultaneously visible. It best preserves the lecture's board layout for later note reconstruction.
